meta_title: For Freelancers: SaaS starter kit to Solve no portfolio (Intermediate Comparison)
meta_description: Learn how to SaaS starter kit and overcome no portfolio. A Intermediate-level Comparison using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: SaaS Starter Kits to Solve No Portfolio
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with no portfolio. Learn how to use SaaS starter kits, Antigravity, and Claude Code to build professional-grade apps at record speed.
content.answer_block: The fastest way to overcome the 'no portfolio' trap is to ship a production-ready SaaS starter kit. By leveraging Antigravity for architecture and Claude Code for iterative implementation, you can build a high-fidelity, functional product in hours—not weeks—demonstrating immediate value to high-paying clients.
content.intro:
The blank screen is a freelancer's worst enemy. You have the technical skills, but without a portfolio, you are stuck in the 'low-pay' loop, fighting for scraps on freelance platforms. Clients don't want to hear about your potential; they want to see the product you just finished.

This is where the paradigm shifts. Instead of building toy apps, you will use a professional SaaS starter kit as a foundation. By combining the structural power of Antigravity with the velocity of Claude Code, you transform from a junior coder into an elite builder who ships scalable, market-ready SaaS applications in a single weekend.

steps.title: Define the Architecture
steps.description: Before writing code, establish your tech stack. Use Antigravity to generate a clean, modular boilerplate that handles authentication, database schema, and payment integration.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a modern SaaS boilerplate using Next.js 14, Tailwind CSS, Supabase, and Stripe. Include role-based access control and a clean directory structure.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'initialize project structure based on Antigravity spec'

steps.title: Automate the Database Schema
steps.description: Standardize your data layer. Use Claude Code to map your business logic to a reliable PostgreSQL schema, ensuring your starter kit is production-ready.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a Prisma schema for a multi-tenant SaaS application, including tables for Users, Organizations, Subscriptions, and Projects.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'apply schema to database and generate migrations'

steps.title: Implement High-Velocity UI
steps.description: Use UI component libraries to ensure your app looks like it cost $50,000 to build. Speed is the priority here.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Design a responsive dashboard layout with a sidebar navigation, data table with filtering, and a user profile settings page.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'implement UI components following provided design system'

steps.title: Integrate Essential SaaS Logic
steps.description: Connect the backend to the frontend. This is where your app becomes 'live' and functional for potential clients to test.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write server-side functions for user authentication and Stripe checkout session creation.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'connect authentication flows and payment API'

steps.title: Deploy and Showcase
steps.description: Push to production so your portfolio has a live link. A working URL is worth 100 lines of GitHub code.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a deployment guide and a README that highlights the technical complexity of this SaaS starter kit.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'audit code, optimize performance, and prepare for Vercel deployment'

pro_tips: Always include a 'demo mode' button in your portfolio apps so recruiters can test functionality without creating an account.
Focus your portfolio on 'vertical' SaaS—build tools for specific niches like dentists or real estate agents; it signals industry domain expertise.
Use Claude Code to document your API endpoints in Swagger/OpenAPI format automatically; it makes you look like a senior architect.
Never ship a portfolio site without a 'Performance' tab showing 90+ Lighthouse scores; clients love fast apps.
Include a 'Roadmap' page in your app to show how you handle product lifecycle, not just code execution.
content.next_steps: Host your finished SaaS starter kit on a custom domain, add a 'Case Study' write-up explaining your architectural choices, and link it directly in your LinkedIn and freelance platform profiles.
content.conversion_block: Stop waiting for the perfect project to land in your lap—build the project that wins the client. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
